commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can restore the admin route reservation and deleted regression/spec coverage without redesigning the export endpoint.; Needs attention: No new third-party supply-chain code was found, but the diff weakens the reserved admin route namespace.; Review finding: [P1] Keep the admin owner handle reserved — convex/lib/publicRouteReservations.ts:1 (sha=f3fdf752e5de2e914dcfdd276fee4603b7aab888)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds an authenticated bulk `/api/v1/plugins/export` ZIP endpoint with family filtering, docs, schema route updates, export pagination/tests, and route-reservation churn.

Reproducibility: yes. for the blocking regression: current main reserves `@admin`, while the PR head removes it and `/admin` remains a route. I did not run tests because this review is read-only, but the source path is direct.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can restore the `admin` route reservation and deleted regression/spec coverage without redesigning the export endpoint.
